commits: 556b7d47: feat(#688): add collapsible left pane to PC worktree detail view

tdd_phases.red: 16 failing tests confirmed (14 from new tests on missing functionality)
tdd_phases.refactor: Code reviewed for type safety, naming clarity, and JSDoc comments

acceptance_criteria_coverage.left_pane_hidden_on_collapse: covered by WorktreeDesktopLayout.test.tsx 'should hide left pane (width: 0) when leftPaneCollapsed is true'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.expand_bar_visible_on_collapse: covered by 'should show expand bar when collapsed'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.expand_bar_button_calls_callback: covered by 'should call onToggleLeftPane when expand button clicked'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.pane_resizer_hidden_on_collapse: covered by 'should hide PaneResizer when collapsed'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.aria_attributes: covered by 'should expose proper aria attributes on expand button'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.keyboard_operable: covered by 'should support keyboard activation (Enter) on expand button'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.mobile_excluded: covered by 'should not render expand bar on mobile even when collapsed'
acceptance_criteria_coverage.localStorage_persistence: covered indirectly via useLocalStorageState (already tested) + 'should toggle left pane collapsed state' verifying state changes that trigger localStorage writes
acceptance_criteria_coverage.reducer_actions: covered by TOGGLE_LEFT_PANE / SET_LEFT_PANE_COLLAPSED reducer tests in useWorktreeUIState.test.ts
acceptance_criteria_coverage.backward_compatibility: WorktreeDesktopLayoutProps new props are optional; all 24 existing tests pass without modification

design_decisions: leftPaneCollapsed/onToggleLeftPane are optional props on WorktreeDesktopLayout to preserve backward compatibility
useLocalStorageState integration uses isHydratedRef to avoid infinite useEffect loops between state and storage
collapsedRef gives the memoized actions object access to current state without changing the [] dependency array semantics
Mobile path entirely bypasses collapse UI by checking useIsMobile() before reaching the DesktopLayout subcomponent
Expand bar uses width 24px (CSS px) to match acceptance criteria; right pane uses calc(100% - 24px) when collapsed
message: TDD実装完了。Red→Green→Refactorサイクルを完了。新規テスト16件追加 (reducer 5件 + hook 1件 + layout 10件)。全6416件パス、カバレッジ90.71%、TypeScript/ESLintエラーゼロ。
